laws.title: New Jersey Minimum Wage — $15.92/hr Large Employers (Effective Jan 1, 2026)
laws.summary: Effective January 1, 2026, New Jersey's minimum wage is $15.92/hour for employers with 6 or more employees, and $15.23/hour for employers with 5 or fewer employees and seasonal employers. New Jersey adjusts its minimum wage annually on January 1 based on the Consumer Price Index.
laws.employee_threshold_note: $15.92/hr for employers with 6+ employees; $15.23/hr for employers with 5 or fewer employees and seasonal employers
compliance_actions: Confirm your employer size classification to apply the correct 2026 rate: $15.92/hr (6+ employees) or $15.23/hr (5 or fewer)
Update payroll systems to reflect the applicable rate effective January 1, 2026
Post the updated 2026 New Jersey Minimum Wage poster in the workplace
Plan for the next annual adjustment effective January 1, 2027
laws.source: New Jersey Department of Labor & Workforce Development
